name: EncounterAdmitSource
title: DataTools4Heart Encounter Admit Source
description: Admit source codes for transport modality not covered by http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/admit-source

concept.definition: Patient arrived by their own means (walked in, drove themselves, or brought by family/friends without emergency services).
Patient transported by ground Emergency Medical Services (ambulance).
Patient transported by air medical services (helicopter or fixed-wing air ambulance).
